---
title: "test_norn_campaign_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_norn_campaign_empire.py"
loc: 30
complexity: 1
logic_score: 6.50
style_score: 3.85
intel_score: 4.07
overall_score: 4.06
---

## Intent
The `test_norn_campaign_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on TestNornWarden, plan_file, test_get_next_target, test_mark_complete. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TestNornWarden, plan_file, test_get_next_target, test_mark_complete. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.1/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.sentinel.muninn](file://src.sentinel.muninn)

### Exports
- `TestNornWarden`
- `plan_file`
- `test_get_next_target`
- `test_mark_complete`
